title: NVIDIA new platform increases HBM demand
summary: NVIDIA announced a new AI platform that significantly increases HBM3E memory demand per GPU, driving tighter supply for HBM capacity.

tickers.exposure_reason: HBM 記憶體測試與研磨設備

title: Taiwan government announces new semiconductor subsidy program
summary: The Ministry of Economic Affairs announced a NT$300B subsidy program for advanced packaging and semiconductor manufacturing equipment over the next 5 years.

sources.title: 經濟部宣布半導體補助計畫

title: TSMC July 2026 monthly revenue exceeds market consensus by 15%
summary: TSMC reported July 2026 revenue of NT$280B, exceeding consensus estimates of NT$243B by 15%, driven by strong 3nm and CoWoS ramp.

title: Samsung reportedly developing custom HBM for NVIDIA next-gen GPUs
summary: Industry sources suggest Samsung is developing custom HBM4 memory tailored for NVIDIA's next-gen Rubin architecture, potentially disrupting the TSMC/CoWoS supply chain.

sources.title: Samsung HBM4 Custom for NVIDIA Rubin
